rationale: The cited paper is not a generic methodological source; it directly studies vice–virtue/temptation choices in snacks and restaurant meals via self-signaling and self-control, which overlaps with the citing paper’s healthy vs. unhealthy food-choice domain. Given this conceptual proximity and a confirmed DOI match (10.1509/jmr.10.0490), the citation could plausibly serve as a theory/foundational prior-work reference rather than an incidental mention.
